notes: Bump Clancy to 0.8.17 (epic branch targeting fix, E2E test infrastructure).
fixes: Updates bundled Clancy to 0.8.17, which fixes epic branch targeting (child issues using #N refs now correctly resolve to epic/{number} instead of milestone/{slug}), adds a guard against GitHub Search API indexing delays on new child tickets, and ships E2E test infrastructure with real GitHub API coverage.
